content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.setup_wizard
FILE: cosmos/core/setup_wizard.py (997 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Setup Wizard - Comprehensive Configuration.

"I've built a machine that lets you choose your own fate!"

This module provides a step-by-step interactive setup for all cosmos systems.
It saves configuration to a local .env file and provides detailed setup guides.

CLASSES:
- UseCase(Enum): Primary use case profiles.
- IntegrationGuide: Setup guide for an integration.
- SetupWizard: Comprehensive setup wizard for all cosmos integrations.
  Methods: async def run(self)
  Methods: def get_quick_guide(integration: str) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def main()
